title: 9 Yellow Rubber Ducks, Squeaking and Floating Classic Duckies, Bathtime Floating Matte Vinyl Baby Bath Time Toys, Cake toppers, Classic Ducks, Bath Time Has Never Been More Fun (9 Ducks)
features: 💦🎉💧🛀 9 CLASSIC FLOATING YELLOW RUBBER DUCKIES - Add spice and verve to bath time whatever your age with these novelty rubber ducks! They will be sure to bring a smile every time you go for a surprise! These ducks float and squeak!
💦🎉💧🛀 MADE FROM QUALITY MATERIALS - Made of high quality Vinyl material that is 100% Safe & Non-Toxic, BPA, Phthalate and Lead-Free. These will surely be a big hit at any party

💦🎉💧🛀 THESE DUCKS ARE GREAT FOR - Themed parties, celebrations, party favours, party bag fillers and gift ideas for kids. Kids love playing with these cute rubber duckies. Give them away as party favours at your next party or use them for duck themed parties or use them as cake and cupcake toppers!

💦🎉💧🛀 HIGHLY DETAILED SQUIRTING DUCKS - Squeeze it to squirt streams of water to make bath time fun. Each duck has a little hole underneath to enable these ducks to squirt. Use sterilising solution to regularly clean them

💦🎉💧🛀 WHAT YOU GET - 9 Rubber ducks. Each Duck Measures: 5cm x 5cm x 4cm approx. / 2" x 2" x 1.6". These ducks are ideal for goody bags and themed pool parties as well as keeping your baby amused in the bath tub
description: Product Description New Creative Avenues Of Play Transform Bath Time! Introducing this set of bath toy ducks these waterproof toys will transform your toddlers bath time experience and leave them eagerly awaiting their next wash so they can play with their toys! Decorative Ducks! These ducks are not just bath toys they can also be used to add fun and charm to your decor at home or even be used to accessorise an outfit, as seen above! These Delightful Ducks Are Ready For New Aquatic Adventures... Are You? These delightful rubber bath ducks are equipped with brilliant features, including squeaks, authentic detailing and stable flotation. The gentle squeaking sound is charming and delights children of any age, turning their bath time into an interactive and sensory experience. Watch as their faces light up with delight when they give these novelty ducks a playful squeeze. The plastic duck itself is made from BPA free materials and is a real crowd-pleaser with the floating design of the bath toy ducks allowing for new creative play, and encouraging water-themed adventures! Pond Life These ducks can be used in a variety of ways. Why not add them to your garden decorations to give it a fun new refresh. Bath Bliss Elevate your relaxing bath routine by adding these rubber ducks to the tub. Their peaceful floating will allow to relax deeply and enjoy your soak. Creative Cakes Have a friend who is crazy for ducks? Decorate their birthday cake with these delightful animals to bring a smile to their face. Charming Shelves Add some radiant rubber ducks to your shelf for some light hearted fun. Bringing a smile to your face each time you use the bathroom.
